scenario.title: Patient changes mind mid-call
scenario.goal: Start by asking to reschedule an appointment, then decide during the call that cancellation would be better.
must_try: Begin by asking to reschedule an existing appointment.
After options are discussed, say it would be better to cancel instead.
scenario.success_condition: The office pivots from rescheduling to cancellation without confusion or contradiction.
good_bug_signals: The agent stays stuck in the original rescheduling flow.
The agent confirms both cancellation and rescheduling inconsistently.
The agent loses track of which appointment action is active.

retell_llm_dynamic_variables.success_condition: The office pivots from rescheduling to cancellation without confusion or contradiction.

User: This 
Agent: Hi, 
User: call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. 
Agent: That's 
User: Thanks for 
Agent: fine, thank 
User: calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria? 
Agent: Yes, this is Maria Lopez. I was calling because I need to res
User: Can you please provide your date of birth? 
Agent: Sure, my date of birth is May 14, 1982.
User: The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it. How can I help you today? 
Agent: Thank you. I have an appointment this Friday at 2:00 PM, and I was hoping to reschedule it to another day if possible.
User: No problem. Can you tell me the reason you need to reschedule your appointment? 
Agent: I just have a scheduling conflict that came up for Friday, so I won’t be able to make it at that time.
User: Let me check for other available appointment times for you. One moment. You have a new patient consultation with doctor Bricker this Friday at nine forty five AM, not two PM. Just to confirm, is this the appointment you want to reschedule? 
Agent: Oh, I’m sorry for the mix-up—yes, that’s the appointment I’d like to reschedule. Thank you for checking.
User: I'm having trouble accessing the available times to reschedule your appointment. I'll connect you to our clinic support team so they could help you right away. Please stay on the line. 
User: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait. Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye. 
Agent: Thank you for your help. I'll try calling back later to sort this out. Goodbye.

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent called Maria Lopez to reschedule her appointment but provided a date of birth that did not match records. The user clarified the correct appointment time and attempted to find alternative times but was unable to access the schedule. The call ended with the user being transferred to a support line that was not helpful, and the agent decided to call back later.
